_doc: Locked-terms glossary for the i18n release fill. HAND-MAINTAINED, like scripts/i18n_blocked_seed.mjs - edit this file to change which terms are shipped to translators, NOT the tool logic. scripts/i18n_fill_worklist.mjs (npm run i18n:worklist) ships this glossary verbatim with EVERY per-language worklist batch so per-locale terminology does not drift. 'verbatim' terms are brand/proper nouns that are never translated (kept byte-identical in every locale). Each 'categories' entry names en key patterns; the worklist tool expands them against src/ui/i18n.catalog and resolves each term's established localized form per language (from the committed overlays) so the bot/translator reuses the canonical wording instead of re-coining it. A '*' in a key pattern matches exactly one dotted segment. These terms are themselves prose: human-required (the worklist never auto-fills them); the glossary is the REFERENCE for the mechanical chrome that mentions them.

verbatim.note: Project / brand name. Never translate; keep byte-identical in every locale (including CJK).

classNames.note: The 9 canonical class names. Use the established localized form already in the resolved table; never re-coin. Many locales keep the cognate (e.g. Paladin, Druid).

abilityNames.note: Ability proper names. Keep the established localized form; do not invent a new rendering for an ability already named elsewhere.

zoneNames.note: Zone proper nouns. Use the established localized name; the Latin root (e.g. Eastbrook, Mirefen, Thornpeak) is usually retained.

dungeonNames.note: Dungeon proper nouns. Use the established localized name; keep it identical wherever the dungeon is referenced.

bankHouse.note: The bank house proper name 'The Gilded Strongbox' and the 'Bank' window label. Reuse the established localized form already coined for the Bursar NPC titles (entities.npcs.bursar_*.title); keep it identical wherever the bank is named. The bank concept renders as zh_CN 银行, zh_TW 銀行, ja 銀行, ko 은행, ru банк.

deedsSystem.note: Book of Deeds (achievements) vocabulary, locked by the non-Latin fills shipped with the window chrome. Deed: zh_CN 功绩, zh_TW 功績, ja 功績, ko 업적, ru деяние. Book of Deeds: zh_CN 功绩之书, zh_TW 功績之書, ja 功績の書, ko 업적의 서, ru Книга деяний. Renown (the deed score; distinct from any reputation concept): zh_CN 名望, zh_TW 名望, ja 名声, ko 명성, ru Известность. Title (cosmetic name suffix): zh_CN 头衔, zh_TW 頭銜, ja 称号, ko 칭호, ru звание. Feat (zero-Renown trophy): zh_CN 壮举, zh_TW 壯舉, ja 偉業, ko 위업, ru подвиг. Chronicle (per-zone task set): zh_CN 编年史, zh_TW 編年史, ja 年代記, ko 연대기, ru летопись. Chronicler (the in-world NPC face of a Chronicle, locked by the entities.npcs.chronicler_* fills): zh_CN 编年史者, zh_TW 編年史者, ja 年代記官, ko 연대기 기록관, ru Летописец. Border (the cosmetic nameplate/panel frame reward, locked by guide.deedsPage.rewardBorder): zh_CN 边框, zh_TW 邊框, ja 枠飾り, ko 테두리, ru Рамка. Keep each identical wherever the system is referenced. Reward titles (19 shipped): Veteran, Champion, Paragon, Mythic, Eternal reuse the game.milestone.* established forms verbatim (see milestoneTitles); the other 14 (Wyrmfeller, the Deathless, Peakbreaker, Bellstiller, of the Vale, of the Mirefen, of Thornpeak, the Curator, the Resplendent, Gladiator, Boarball Legend, Magnate, the Wayfarer, the Footnote) are coined once per locale in the deed locale chunks (src/ui/deed_i18n.locales/<locale>.ts) and kept identical wherever referenced.

milestoneTitles.note: The five lifetime-XP milestone titles, unified into deeds as their reward titles. The deed locale table's title fields for prog_veteran, prog_champion, prog_paragon, prog_mythic, and prog_eternal MUST reuse these established localized forms verbatim; never re-coin them.

steamLink.note: Steam account-link vocabulary (the character-select card + apiError.steam.*), locked by the non-Latin fills shipped with the link surface. Steam stays Latin everywhere (brand). Link (the account-link verb): zh_CN 关联, zh_TW 連結, ja 連携, ko 연동, ru привязать (linked state: привязан). Steam achievements (the platform term the deeds mirror writes to): zh_CN Steam 成就, zh_TW Steam 成就, ja Steam実績, ko Steam 도전 과제, ru достижения Steam. Keep each identical wherever the link surface is referenced.
